Home RSVP Wedding Party Directions FAQs

Timothy and Miguel

October 10, 2026

We invite you celebrate with us as we become husbands.


Our Story

Although we met playing Bernardo and Tony in West Side Story, our story has a much happier ending. Over the years, we have stood by one another through thick and thin, blended our families, and built a life together filled with love, laughter, and support. As we begin this new chapter, we are excited to continue our journey, not just as partners, but as husbands. Thank you for being part of our story and for celebrating this special day with us.
